speaker: Unknown
text: Oh, Professor Derich.

speaker: Professor Derich
text: When I make a trip to the restroom, I encounter Professor Derich who seems to have just got there and is pulling down his zipper.

speaker: Diederich
text: Hm? Oh, country boy?

speaker: Argo
text: Why are you calling me that?

speaker: Diederich
text: Sorry, I forgot your name.

speaker: Argo
text: It's Argo...

speaker: Diederich
text: Right, I won’t forget next time.

speaker: Argo
text: Thank you

speaker: Argo
text: Can I take the one next to you?

speaker: Diederich
text: You don’t need my permission, go wherever ya want.

speaker: Diederich
text: Ah, but don’t do it on the floor. *paw prints*

speaker: Argo
text: I wouldn't do something like that. *paw prints*

speaker: Diederich
text: Really? Well at least some of the guys they let in here have a brain.

speaker: Diederich
text: Those brats in front of me were a bunch of idiots. Can't even take my eyes off 'em for a second.

speaker: Argo
text: What kind of horrible situation did he get into...??

speaker: Unknown
text: I stand next the professor, pull my zipper down as well, and begin to relieve myself.

speaker: Narration
text: *The sounds of our urine splashing quietly echoes. It seems like the sound of his is slightly louder than mine.*

speaker: Diederich
text: ......Whew

speaker: Narration
text:
*After we finish and shake off the last few drops,
Professor Derich and I step away from the urinals.*

speaker: Diederich
text: Well, since we're here, is there anything you wanna discuss?

speaker: Unknown
text: Discuss?

speaker: Diederich
text: It's also our job to see how students are doin' and provide some mental care.

speaker: Argo
text: How responsible of you...

speaker: Diederich
text: Hey now, are you sayin’ I look irresponsible?
(...Does he even need to ask...?)

speaker: Unknown
text: (...What should I do?)

speaker: Argo
text: So you use the dorm restrooms too, huh?

speaker: Diederich
text: Sometimes, yeah. This just happened to be the closest one.

speaker: Argo
text: Was there something you had to take care of in the dorms today?

speaker: Diederich
text:
Just a short chat with Prince Theo.

Narration
*Hello.*

speaker: Theo
text: *I’m not sure what to do next...*

speaker: Diederich
text: Ah, sorry. Should I not bring him up? I heard there was some trouble between you two.

speaker: Argo
text: There certainly was...

speaker: Diederich
text: Well, that's just how he is. Maybe he’s got a lot on his mind or somethin’

speaker: Argo
text:
*I’m not sure what to say...*

Narration
*.........*

speaker: Diederich
text: It must have been tough with him pickin’ a fight with you right on the first day, too.

speaker: Argo
text: I... just want to get along with everyone.

speaker: Diederich
text: Keep that attitude and I'm sure you and the Harshreich students will come to an understandin' someday.

speaker: Argo
text: You really think so...?

speaker: Diederich
text: Being from different countries don’t mean much. As a foreigner myself, I guarantee it.

speaker: Argo
text: Oh? You're from another country?

speaker: Diederich
text: Yep.

speaker: Argo
text: I see... So the Knights College has foreign professors too.

speaker: Unknown
text: (...What should I do?)

speaker: Argo
text: Um... pardon me for asking, but-

speaker: Diederich
text: There's no need for that, ask away!

speaker: Argo
text: Well in that case... What country are you from?

speaker: Diederich
text: Ah. I'm from Ludvigo.

speaker: Argo
text: What did you do there?

speaker: Diederich
text: Hm? Oh, I was a pirate.

speaker: Argo
text: Wait, a what?

speaker: Diederich
text: You know, a pirate.

speaker: Unknown
text: Uh... Really?

speaker: Diederich
text: What, you don’t believe me? 😏

speaker: Argo
text: You really were one? 😢

speaker: Diederich
text: Yes, that's what I said!

speaker: Argo
text: A pirate is a professor at the knights college...?

speaker: Diederich
text: You never know where life's gonna take you, you know? My life then and now couldn't be more different.

speaker: Unknown
text: They're the exact opposite...

speaker: Argo
text: But I was going to be a fisherman. Now I'm enrolled in a knights college. I can kind of understand that...

speaker: Diederich
text: What?! A fisherman!?

speaker: Argo
text: Yeah. My family has been fishing off the coast for generations.

speaker: Diederich
text: Oh yeah, you did say you're from a fishin' village, didn't you?

speaker: Argo
text: That's right. I used to ride on my old man’s boat and go fishing all the time.

speaker: Diederich
text: Oh, you shoulda said so sooner! That makes you a "man o' the sea" too, don't it!?

speaker: Argo
text: Heh, we're connected by the sea.

speaker: Diederich
text: Well, ain't this a first! This young man is the first man o' the sea to enroll!

speaker: Diederich
text: We gotta shake hands! Come on! To commemorate us meetin’!

speaker: Argo
text: Is that a good idea? He hasn’t washed his hands...

speaker: Diederich
text: Right, you should swing by my room. I've got somethin' nice to show you.

speaker: Unknown
text: Y-Your room? I can’t

speaker: Diederich
text: Sure, don’t be shy! A man o’ the sea is always welcome!

speaker: Argo
text: O-Okay! Thank you so much! 😊

speaker: Argo
text: (A professor’s room?! Now I’m curious... I should stop by later.)

speaker: Argo
text: (I guess being a country bumpkin worked out in my favor for once.)

speaker: Argo
text: Excuse me, I should get going.

speaker: Diederich
text: Sure, see you later, Argo.

speaker: Unknown
text: (He remembered......)

speaker: Argo
text:
I’m not sure what to say… *sigh*

Narration
*It’s been a long day.*

speaker: Unknown
text: When I heard the sounds of us peeing earlier... Does that mean his is a lot bigger than mine too? *paw prints*

speaker: Unknown
text: No, sound doesn’t have anything to do with that... He was probably just pushing harder.

speaker: Diederich
text: ...Oi, where are you lookin’ at? 😏

speaker: Argo
text: Oh, uh, nothing.

speaker: Diederich
text: Bullshit! I saw your eyes flickin' back and forth!

speaker: Argo
text: Ooh...

speaker: Unknown
text: Darn, was it that obvious?

speaker: Diederich
text: Just tell me if you wanna see it! I don’t mind showin’ you!

speaker: Unknown
text: Huh? *paw prints*

speaker: Diederich
text: I hate it when people aren't honest with their feelings. Quite the opposite, I like people who are honest to a fault.

speaker: Argo
text:
*I’m not sure what to say…*

Narration
*paw prints...*

speaker: Diederich
text: So, you wanna see?

speaker: Argo
text: No thank you, I'm fine 😊

speaker: Diederich
text: What? Boring.

speaker: Argo
text:
*I’m not sure what to say...*

Narration
*....paw prints...*
